query: SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.email, g.telefone, g.clinicaId FROM gestantes g WHERE g.nome LIKE '%Nathalia%' OR g.nome LIKE '%Natalia%' ORDER BY g.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.email, g.telefone, g.clinicaId FROM gestantes g WHERE g.nome LIKE '%Nathalia%' OR g.nome LIKE '%Natalia%' ORDER BY g.nome;
